response.text:

rationale: Your SoC (10% below share threshold) conflicts with our policy minimum of 55%; our own 44% SoC and network-wide stress require conservative posture—normal urgency requests deferred until grid reconnection or our SoC recovers above 50%.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
